reason: The image depicts a man in a top hat and heavy wool coat standing before Victoria Falls. The sepia tones and film grain contribute to the desired 19th-century aesthetic, mimicking the style of collodion wet plate photography. There are no immediately discernible anachronisms or elements of fantasy. The man's clothing (coat, hat) is appropriate for the time period. No modern objects (cars, smartphones, etc.) are visible. The backdrop of the waterfalls further strengthens the association with the event 'Livingstone at Victoria Falls'. While the man may be a bit too clean and well-dressed for the time and conditions of exploration, the image overall is suitable. However, the background details are quite blurred which lowers the final score.
